headline: Comcast to Participate in Evercore Investor Conference
summary: PHILADELPHIA, May 19, 2026--Comcast Corporation (Nasdaq: CMCSA) announced that on Tuesday, June 2, 2026, Matt Strauss, Chairman of NBCUniversal Media Group, will participate in the Evercore Global TMT Conference.

headline: Comcast Business Helps the Roaming Bean Grow From Coffee Cart to Community Anchor in Pittsburgh’s Strip District
summary: PITTSBURGH, May 19, 2026--What started as a mobile coffee cart in 2022 is now one of Pittsburgh's most talked-about neighborhood cafés. The Roaming Bean opened its first permanent storefront in the Strip District in January 2026 – and Comcast Business is powering the technology behind it. In celebration of Small Business Month, The Roaming Bean and Comcast Business hosted a community coffee giveaway on May 18th, welcoming Pittsburgh residents to experience the new café and marking a milestone mo

headline: Comcast (CMCSA) Announces Quarterly Dividend of $0.33 per Share
summary: Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) is included among the Top 12 Undervalued Dividend Stocks to Buy Now. Comcast Corporation (NASDAQ:CMCSA) declared a quarterly dividend of $0.33 per share on May 14. The dividend is payable on July 22 to shareholders […]

headline: Eight Leading U.S. Communications Firms Form C2 ISAC to Strengthen Cybersecurity Collaboration
summary: Eight of the nation's leading communications companies – AT&T, Charter, Comcast, Cox, Lumen Technologies, T-Mobile, Verizon, and Zayo – have established the Communications Cybersecurity Information Sharing and Analysis Center, known as C2 ISAC. The new non-profit is dedicated to strengthening cybersecurity across the communications sector.
